name: Democrats.org
subject: ✍️ Add your name: tell the Senate to reject health care repeal
body:
We have to fight back. **Tell the Senate to protect affordable health care for every American.

** **[ADD YOUR NAME](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Stop-the-Republican-Health-Care-Bill1?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=em_20170604_dnc2_nd&source=em_20170604_dnc2_nd")**

This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Thanks for supporting our party.

name: The White House
subject: Your 1600 Daily
body:
1600 Daily Everything White House for 6/5/2017. |
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=96485d98b258f28f6be5b8b149beefe9622b40c752398d5fcac70c6c633c0b032b48f0ad5f67e2edafc4a2bd1b0faada4b32ae3863a046b8

President Donald J. Trump is launching infrastructure week today with the
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=96485d98b258f28f28a76c273d0394e50ce9d7d658c45a7d5328cfbf5a6225be43abeeb0462c4e0e254216d443fc3e6d25b2c2af6a6b3777
signing of legislative principles calling for the separation of Air Traffic Control from the FAA. This action will improve safety, modernize flight technology, and encourage new technologies in aviation. President Trump has dedicated this week to addressing America's crumbling infrastructure.

Today's Events

11:30 AM: President Trump announces the Air Traffic Control Reform Initiative -
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=96485d98b258f28f28a76c273d0394e50ce9d7d658c45a7d5328cfbf5a6225be43abeeb0462c4e0e254216d443fc3e6d25b2c2af6a6b3777
Watch

12:30 PM: President Trump has lunch with Vice President Pence and Secretary of Education Betsy DeVos

1:30 PM: Press Briefing with Principal Deputy Press Secretary Sarah Sanders -
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=96485d98b258f28f79516f368a6c744bc96d68bce0b5f0da491598a7f87afb9324f96c804e11f2c2c11a0f825ebf840654d03f66740f18ec
Watch

2:30 PM: Vice President Pence hosts a healthcare listening session with HHS Secretary Tom Price, CMS Administrator Seema Verma, and SBA Administrator Linda McMahon

5:30 PM: President Trump and the First Lady host a reception for Gold Star Families

Photo of the Day

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=96485d98b258f28f6b687a43f6facac08334a8231b8bc09dec08811b1744e1cb4502e7ecb2405a168798f3e3aaeabc6c31e4a69faccd3821

Ford's Theatre | June 4, 2017 (Official White House Photo by Shealah Craighead)

WHITE HOUSE UPDATES

Obamacare continues to fail Americans: Average individual
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=96485d98b258f28f35db56025ffe28dfb6903565326384a81006d06618e3944028fbded7eef0c1f28a9439c0dae0427ce80d6b3502115a34
health insurance premiums have more than doubled since Obamacare was implemented.

Last Friday, President Trump
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=96485d98b258f28f21c62c3046a0215f0a124ab45be5e4b3e4b0a358ac1db7a7df1f974b2a5809345eeeebfc3fb30963557b74fa22747bf0
signed two bills into law to support our Nation's heroes: the Public Safety Officers’ Benefits Improvement Act of 2017 and the American Law Enforcement Heroes Act of 2017.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=96485d98b258f28f155378d3636c15ee42907c578667a90004aac2e1a6baa4ed1c0befb30200ebf6838263eeb171a9c50e879e6d76921eb5

On Saturday, President Trump
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=96485d98b258f28fd71e6c260945e57b0e63cf3f36c0a5be3b6b7dfbf0298062dc63cd87c802287a253e21a2e52262a082d40917301969c7
spoke with Prime Minister Theresa May of the United Kingdom to offer his condolences for the brutal terror attacks on June 3 in central London. He praised the heroic response of police and other first responders and offered the full support of the United States Government in investigating and bringing those responsible for these heinous acts to justice.

Yesterday, President Trump and the First Lady
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=96485d98b258f28f91d1d610f08684eb178d91963c6d014213b0ecda2bb6f96eb57ae06a4215ba718ee5978adadb14e7d70dc0543306ea6c
hosted the Ford’s Theatre pre-Gala reception at the White House and
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=96485d98b258f28f91d1d610f08684eb178d91963c6d014213b0ecda2bb6f96eb57ae06a4215ba718ee5978adadb14e7d70dc0543306ea6c
attended a variety show hosted by Larry Gatlin at Ford's Theatre.

What We Are Reading

"Rural areas would get federal dollars to rebuild roads, bridges and other infrastructure projects under a plan President Donald Trump will announce..."
-
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=96485d98b258f28f9ee347e9e3d1900d1cd708add921a3367ed2165fdc02c0d2f1e6616005a674c7c99523d7c009dbc913e61a04ae0a2cbb
McClatchy

"What the nation won’t do, thanks to the president, is devastate its own economy against the public’s wishes in order to satisfy the global elite. Count this as a major Trump promise kept."
-
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=96485d98b258f28fb25e4ae303230c3dd42da920c9163b4ec37f39233c960cf1173c62dd9a93f327263f689674c53f2438014916599bb1a4
The New York Post

"The entire Paris agreement was a largely meaningless piece of public relations stagecraft, designed for world leaders to give the illusion that they are doing something about climate change...President Trump was right to remove the United States from this non-treaty."
-
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=96485d98b258f28fce714539812003d95d6f6e502d375bf798ee41f8228b7a42a9a3fc2f27c88c6830b975c4a85f4506fdab3c81f0cdf898
New Hampshire Union Leader

“Nearly 100,000 Nebraskans apparently will have only one choice for individual health insurance next year. Nebraska Gov. Pete Ricketts said Blue Cross’s decision “demonstrates the failure of Obamacare and how the system was so poorly designed that great companies like Blue Cross Blue Shield can’t stay in the marketplace. It highlights that Congress needs to act to make the health care system sustainable.” -
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=96485d98b258f28f67737afed17f0f9621956180d15f169cc8041ae5f7f91c1b59556cd5bd515ef595a904fdcd30560ddfc5ba5fe6146851
The Omaha World-Herald

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=96485d98b258f28fac9e83b32457401db47b768b5f41c95d77d80e29e19248f0db9161af669a24d05c2a12c03ba098c377a2c2b0cca79471
Privacy Policy |

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=96485d98b258f28fb0fdf320889400e92eb790e2f27a21704cb0490113e72643340117dcaab6c85b7547a64e2c48bbab3b350075be9853be
Contact the White House |

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/unsub_center.aspx?qs=d453c42a6560d1d4c75bff52e40b2130bf1e07c9ac55982188714e9e5e141d7d202dd965b6e4df987b926d6e8d3a41e67723308566469008
Unsubscribe

name: Trump Headquarters
subject: Keeping options open…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican National Committee
body:
American Possibilities. That's what they're calling it. |

**Breaking: "Joe Biden takes first concrete step toward...2020 run"**
The Left just doesn't get it, Peter.

American voters rejected Hillary Clinton's and Barack Obama's disastrous policies last November, but now Joe Biden is preparing to challenge President Trump in 2020.

Unfortunately, extreme liberals like Joe Biden will spend every waking minute over the next four years trying to tear down OUR President, but we're working day and night to defend President Trump, and we need your help.

[**Peter, please contribute $250, $100, $50, $25 or even just $1 now to show Joe Biden and any other liberal who decides to run that America supports our President.**](http://click1.action.gop.com/qwsjpqwcfbntgqgqtvrvwtywhytchhvrjsgvsmymsvwnvf_vjvfjjmggrh.html?a=1260&b=87529&c=17786605)

Joe Biden won't be the only Democrat to try to stop all of Donald Trump's progress, and with the fake news media committed now more than ever to spreading lies about the President, we need to be ready.

We're counting on top supporters like you to ensure another victory for the American People in 2020 behind the leadership of President Trump and an AMERICA FIRST administration.

**[If you're with us, please contribute anything you can to defend the President today ->](http://click1.action.gop.com/estvzlschkdfblblftwtsfjspjfcpptwvybtyrjrytsdtz_vjvfjjmggrh.html?a=1260&b=87529&c=17786605)**

[CONTRIBUTE $250](http://click1.action.gop.com/fsjcgzspnfqwjzjzwblbswtsrtwprrblchjbhdtdhbsqbr_vjvfjjmggrh.html?a=1260&b=87529&c=17786605)
[CONTRIBUTE $100](http://click1.action.gop.com/srkzsfrgkdjtmfmftchcrtwrlwtgllchzvmcvbwbvcrjcp_vjvfjjmggrh.html?a=1260&b=87529&c=17786605)
[CONTRIBUTE $50](http://click1.action.gop.com/okmcrgzplvfdwgwgdknkzdszmsdpmmkncjwkjtstjkzfwf_vjvfjjmggrh.html?a=1260&b=87529&c=17786605)
[CONTRIBUTE $25](http://click1.action.gop.com/okqcrgzplvfdwgwgdknkzdszmsdpmmkncjwkjtstjkzfwt_vjvfjjmggrh.html?a=1260&b=87529&c=17786605)
[CONTRIBUTE $5](http://click1.action.gop.com/ljzfwpklnyzrjpjprdcdkrskqsrlqqdcfgjdgmsmgdkzjk_vjvfjjmggrh.html?a=1260&b=87529&c=17786605)
[CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT](http://click1.action.gop.com/ebrvzlschkdfblblftwtsfjspjfcpptwvybtyrjrytsdby_vjvfjjmggrh.html?a=1260&b=87529&c=17786605)

Thank you, now let's keep winning.

Team TRUMP

[CONTRIBUTE $100](http://click1.action.gop.com/ndycrhybpzwndhdhntmtyngyjgnbjjtmcfdtfqgqftywdt_vjvfjjmggrh.html?a=1260&b=87529&c=17786605)

name: Democrats.org
subject: I hear you, Derek
body:
Elect Democrats.
---
**Add your name: say you'll fight to elect Democrats who will resist Donald Trump, his administration, and the harmful GOP agenda.

** **[ADD YOUR NAME](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Elect-Democrats-JOC1?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=em_20170605_joc_v1s2&source=em_20170605_joc_v1s2")**
Hi, Derek --

I want to start by saying thank you for the warm welcome, your messages, and the important feedback you shared with me about the direction you think our party needs to go in.

Thousands of you sent in your thoughts, and I want you to know that I heard you loud and clear. I'm committed to getting this party back on track, making sure we're clearly and effectively communicating our message in every corner of this country, uplifting opportunities for more people to get involved with our work together, and taking the fight to the GOP.

That's Tom's vision for our party, too -- and it's why it was such an easy decision for me to take this job. Tom is committed to expanding on Howard Dean's 50-state strategy. Together, we're going to get out there, knock on doors, and talk to every American.

**[That's how we'll build our party back up to be better than it ever was before. But we can't do it without you -- so I need to know you'll be part of this.](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Elect-Democrats-JOC1?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+Thats+how+well+build+our+party+back+up+t&utm_campaign=em_20170605_joc_v1s2&source=em_20170605_joc_v1s2")**

We've already taken decisive action to rebuild our party at every level. We're investing more into state and local Democratic parties, and we're putting the spirit and fight that grassroots supporters like you have shown at the forefront of everything we do.

We have a long road ahead of us, Derek. It's going to take some tough conversations and hard work day in and day out to get us where we need to be to fight back against this administration and win elections up and down the ticket all over the country.

**Today, I'm asking you to be a part of it -- because we can't do this without you. If you're in, say so today:**

**[ADD YOUR NAME](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Elect-Democrats-JOC1?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME&utm_campaign=em_20170605_joc_v1s2&source=em_20170605_joc_v1s2")**
I look forward to hearing more from you, and I can't wait to see the results of everything we're going to accomplish together.

Thanks,

Jess

Jess O'Connell
Chief Executive Officer
Democratic National Committee

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cdb1/4067b0a/2a2f89c66/7e6915e3/1153012478/VEsC/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20170605_joc_v1s2&source=em_20170605_joc_v1s2"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cdb1/4067b0a/2a2f89c66/7e6915e0/1153012478/VEsD/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170605_joc_v1s2&source=em_20170605_joc_v1s2"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cdb1/4067b0a/2a2f89c66/7e6915e1/1153012478/VEsA/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170605_joc_v1s2&source=em_20170605_joc_v1s2") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cdb1/4067b0a/2a2f89c66/7e6915ee/1153012478/VEsB/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20170605_joc_v1s2&source=em_20170605_joc_v1s2"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting our party.

name: Chuck Schumer
subject: I'm asking, team
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
This is important: I'm asking you to show you're in the fight with us against President Trump and his allies in Congress.
---
**[](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dscc-schumer?refcode=DPE-20170605-Schumer-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")**
Team, it's hard to remember a time when there were so many outrageous stories in the news.

And yet, there's never been a more critical time for us to stay focused.

All of this Trump chaos is seen as a gift by the GOP. In fact, the GOP is counting on the smoke and mirrors of this administration to distract us from the real agenda they are working on (behind closed doors, of course).

But if we take our eyes off the fights in front of us -- health care for 23 million Americans, billions of dollars for Medicaid and Social Security, and progress for working families -- could all be lost just to give more tax breaks to millionaires and billionaires.

[**So I 'm asking, team. Will you to chip in $1 to help us stay focused on the fights ahead? Your gift will help show that grassroots Democrats reject the Trump and GOP agenda AND support our candidates across the country.**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dscc-schumer?refcode=DPE-20170605-Schumer-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

In a 24-hour window, we saw how much damage President Trump can do -- his historic mistake to deny climate change and pull the U.S. out of the Paris agreement spells disaster for our children and grandchildren, and our global standing.

There is one way to correct for President Trump's failures -- and that is to stay focused on electing Democrats and keeping our senators fighting on the frontlines.

That's why I'm asking for your help, whatever you can give right now, to show you're with us in these fights and make sure we have the resources we need.

**Even $1 makes a big difference. Please, make a donation right now:**

**[Pitch in $1 IMMEDIATELY>>](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dscc-schumer?refcode=DPE-20170605-Schumer-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=1")

[Pitch in $5 IMMEDIATELY >>](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dscc-schumer?refcode=DPE-20170605-Schumer-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=5")

[Pitch in $15 IMMEDIATELY >>](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dscc-schumer?refcode=DPE-20170605-Schumer-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=15")

[Pitch in $25 IMMEDIATELY >>](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dscc-schumer?refcode=DPE-20170605-Schumer-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=25")

[Pitch in $35 IMMEDIATELY >>](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dscc-schumer?refcode=DPE-20170605-Schumer-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=35")

[Or donate another amount.](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dscc-schumer?refcode=DPE-20170605-Schumer-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")**

Thank you for all that you do,

Chuck Schumer

**Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. Please add us to your address book or approved senders list to make sure you keep receiving DSCC updates. Emails are a critical way for us to stay in touch with our grassroots supporters. 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. We also strive to keep you updated on issues related to the Democratic Party's values.

If you'd like to take a break from DSCC emails, [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e6aa/2b07114c/2b0dd9e5/736f3568/2684403781/VEsHAQ/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/take-an-email-break?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e6aa/2b07114c/2b0dd9e5/736f356b/2684403781/VEsHAA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-disclaimer"). Together, we're going to take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to stop receiving all emails from the DSCC, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954e6aa/2b07114c/2b0dd9e5/736f356a/2684403781/VEsHAw/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/content/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). We greatly appreciate your continued support. Contributions or gifts to the DSCC are not tax deductible.

name: DonaldJTrump.com
subject: Your President keeps fighting
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
Travel Ban. |
[](http://click1.action.gop.com/qmdjpqwcfbntgqgqtvrvwtywhytchhvrjsgvsmymsvwnpd_bclpccbqqdg_xgjsjrrv.html?a=1247&b=87552&c=17786605)

Peter,

The Fake News Media attacked President Trump for speaking the truth after the London terrorist attacks.

[](http://click1.action.gop.com/hsvlhrqdwgnzcrcrzspsqzjqmjzdmmsplbcsbvjvbsqnmn_bclpccbqqdg_bdcbcggl.html?a=1247&b=87552&c=17786605) The media doesn't understand that the American people are sick of platitudes, political correctness, and empty words...

**We want ACTION.**
That's why President Trump and Attorney General Jeff Sessions are FIGHTING for the Travel Ban all the way to the Supreme Court.

**Do you stand with President Trump?**
[YES](http://click1.action.gop.com/ldkfwpklnyzrjpjprdcdkrskqsrlqqdcfgjdgmsmgdkzqm_bclpccbqqdg_ofrmrwwz.html?a=1247&b=87552&c=17786605)

Thanks,

Team TRUMP

You are receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com
Trump Make America Great Again Committee, 138 Conant Street, 2nd Floor, Beverly, MA 01915

It's because of grassroots supporters like you that we will Make America Great Again, and we appreciate your support. Thank you for all that you do!

name: Roy Cooper
subject: HUGE Supreme Court ruling
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
We have to take advantage of this opportunity. With fairer maps, we have a real chance to make big gains in the legislature.
|
[](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1202c0d/2fde7c66/4203b0d7/1569789d/888700840/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIyODQ1NyIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/170605-voting-supremecourt?utm_campaign=em17_170605_supcrt_fnd_gq_ful__rc&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&refcode=em17_170605_supcrt_fnd_gq_ful__rc&firstname=&lastname=&zip=28457&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")
---
Friends, We just got the news: The Supreme Court upheld the ruling that struck down NCGOP's electoral maps as unconstitutional racial gerrymandering! This is huge. And here's what it means: The legislators who were elected under the unconstitutional maps will all be up for re-election next year under much different circumstances. **With fairer maps, we have a real chance to make big gains in the legislature. But it will take all of us working together to get it done. Let's use today's ruling as a springboard into the 2018 elections. Chip in today:** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [**$5 »**](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1202c0d/2fde7c66/4203b0d7/1569789c/888700840/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIyODQ1NyIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIiwiZTNzZ1lYTnJJSDE5IjoiNSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/170605-voting-supremecourt?utm_campaign=em17_170605_supcrt_fnd_gq_ful__rc&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&refcode=em17_170605_supcrt_fnd_gq_ful__rc&firstname=&lastname=&zip=28457&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&express_lane=true&amount=5")

---
| [**$100 »**](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1202c0d/2fde7c66/4203b0d7/1569789e/888700840/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIyODQ1NyIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIiwiZTNzZ1lYTnJNeUI5ZlE9PSI6IjEwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/170605-voting-supremecourt?utm_campaign=em17_170605_supcrt_fnd_gq_ful__rc&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&refcode=em17_170605_supcrt_fnd_gq_ful__rc&firstname=&lastname=&zip=28457&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&express_lane=true&amount=100")

| | [**Other »**](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1202c0d/2fde7c66/4203b0d7/1569789d/888700840/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIyODQ1NyIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/170605-voting-supremecourt?utm_campaign=em17_170605_supcrt_fnd_gq_ful__rc&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&refcode=em17_170605_supcrt_fnd_gq_ful__rc&firstname=&lastname=&zip=28457&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")
---
The people of North Carolina should be able to choose their representatives in competitive districts -- instead of the representatives being able to choose the people in lopsided, partisan districts.
This decision will be good for our democracy by leveling the playing field for free and fair elections.
But it will take us all making phone calls, knocking on doors, talking to our neighbors -- doing all the work that we did last year to defeat Governor McCrory.
**[We have to take advantage of this opportunity. Please, chip in today.](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1202c0d/2fde7c66/4203b0d7/1569789d/888700840/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIyODQ1NyIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/170605-voting-supremecourt?utm_campaign=em17_170605_supcrt_fnd_gq_ful__rc&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&refcode=em17_170605_supcrt_fnd_gq_ful__rc&firstname=&lastname=&zip=28457&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")**
Thanks for all you continue to do,
Roy

name: House Republicans
subject: Pathetic?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Team Ryan, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Ryan for Congress, Inc
body:
Friend --

_Pathetic_.

**That 's what Nancy Pelosi called Paul Ryan**. Why? Because he supports Donald Trump's withdrawal from the Paris Agreement.

So we want to know . . .
_
What 's so pathetic about saving American jobs?

What's so pathetic about keeping energy affordable?

What's so pathetic about cancelling on a raw deal for America?_

After 8 years of apology tours and leading from behind, Donald Trump and House Republicans say it's time to put America first by withdrawing from the Paris Agreement.

[**If you agree, send a message to the Democrats by chipping in $15 now >>**](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjkyNjg1ODYS1&r=NDY4NTQ0MTA2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTA2MDYzNTAyNgS2&mt=1&rt=0)****

name: Jill Vogel for Lieutenant Governor
subject: Jill Vogel Reports $1.66 Million Raised on Final Pre-Primary Filing
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Vogel for Virginia45 North Hill Drive, Suite 100Warrenton, VA 20186
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| | |
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE
June 5th, 2017
Vogel's Home Stretch Fundraising Prepares Her to Win June Primary Raised $1.66 Million; Overcomes Significant Cash on Hand Gap from the Start of the Race
WARRENTON, VA - With the closing of the final regular reporting period before next week's Republican primary, Jill Vogel, candidate for Lieutenant Governor, added to her financial edge by reporting over $1.66 million raised, including $449k in the current reporting period, adding to Jill's broad donor base with 565 additional contributions.
During this two month period, Vogel spent nearly $1 million getting her message out to every corner of Virginia."Our entire team is so grateful for the broad support we have received from all across Virginia," said Senator Jill Vogel. "I could not be more thrilled with how well our positive vision is being received and I am incredibly thankful to everyone who has helped our campaign share that message with voters."Despite trailing in cash on hand by almost $500,000 at the start of this race, Vogel's tenacious fundraising and strategic spending decisions allowed her to erase that gap in the critical closing months of the primary.
"The strength shown on this final report means Jill's conservative message will be heard in every corner of the Commonwealth," added Campaign Manager Pat Trueman. "While we will continue raising money through June 13th to fund last-minute digital efforts, our strong financial position empowers Jill to become a well-known and unifying figure to Republicans across the Commonwealth."
###
---
| |
---
| Paid for and Authorized by Vogel for Virginia45 North Hill Drive, Suite 100Warrenton, VA 20186

---

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE June 5th, 2017 Vogel's Home Stretch Fundraising Prepares Her to Win June Primary Raised $1.66 Million; Overcomes Significant Cash on Hand Gap from the Start of the Race WARRENTON, VA - With the closing of the final regular reporting period before next week's Republican primary, Jill Vogel, candidate for Lieutenant Governor, added to her financial edge by reporting over $1.66 million raised, including $449k in the current reporting period, adding to Jill's broad donor base with 565 additional contributions. During this two month period, Vogel spent nearly $1 million getting her message out to every corner of Virginia."Our entire team is so grateful for the broad support we have received from all across Virginia," said Senator Jill Vogel. "I could not be more thrilled with how well our positive vision is being received and I am incredibly thankful to everyone who has helped our campaign share that message with voters."Despite trailing in cash on hand by almost $500,000 at the start of this race, Vogel's tenacious fundraising and strategic spending decisions allowed her to erase that gap in the critical closing months of the primary. "The strength shown on this final report means Jill's conservative message will be heard in every corner of the Commonwealth," added Campaign Manager Pat Trueman. "While we will continue raising money through June 13th to fund last-minute digital efforts, our strong financial position empowers Jill to become a well-known and unifying figure to Republicans across the Commonwealth." | | | Paid for and Authorized by Vogel for Virginia45 North Hill Drive, Suite 100Warrenton, VA 20186 | Follow Jill on Facebook and Twitter for Campaign Updates == == | | | Vogel for Virginia | 45 North Hill Drive, Suite 100, Warrenton, VA 20186 | | Sent by mailto:info@vogelforvirginia.com in collaboration with |
